name: Heinrich Field Staff
subject: RE: Voter Reg (make sure you've seen this!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
| | | | Did you see Martin's note yet, friend? Hitting this goal will help power our work for this weekend, which is more critical than ever as we approach the voter registration deadline.

**_[You can contribute here to support our grassroots organizing and help restock our supplies!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+You+can+contribute+here+to+support+our+g&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")_**

\-- Thanks from the Heinrich Field Staff

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

**We are just five days out from New Mexico 's voter registration deadline**, which means we need to make the most of every single day. That means ramping up our organizing efforts in these final days to ensure Democrats are registered to vote.

When we planned for grassroots organizing efforts -- like door knocking and phone banks -- we bought supplies that we thought would last us until after the registration deadline. **But with all the buzz and excitement among Democrats, we 're now projected to run out of supplies before Sunday!**

**[SUPPLY OUR VOLUNTEERS](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+SUPPLY+OUR+VOLUNTEERS&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")**
Slowing down our organizing efforts right before the voter registration deadline would be a disaster, team. We don't have time to fall behind on our door knocking or phone bank targets, and that's why I am asking for your help today.

**_[We need to keep our volunteers and offices supplied so they can talk to and register as many voters as possible. Can you help us raise another $20,000 before the weekend so we can restock our volunteer supplies? Donate now!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+We+need+to+keep+our+volunteers+and+offic&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ **[Donate $10 for a box of pens](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+for+a+box+of+pens&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")** **[Donate $29 for water for volunteers](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+for+water+for+volunteers&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")** ****[Donate $50 to canvassing supplies](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+to+canvassing+supplies&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")** Gary Johnson and Mick Rich are spending over six-figures each to support their campaigns, and Johnson has super PACs in the wings ready to boost him.

That's not what I believe in. I'm relying on grassroots supporters and donors like you to win this race. That's why it's so important we hit this goal before the weekend so our teams have what they need before the voter registration deadline.

**_[You can support our grassroots programs by donating here before our deadline tomorrow: http://nm.martinheinrich.com/organizing-supplies](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+You+can+support+our+grassroots+programs+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")_**

Thank you for all you do,

Martin

**P.S. -- Whether you think you 're registered to vote or you've been planning on doing it, now is the time! [Check your voter registration status here ->](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b7a0/43d8135f/66f43ee7/510050a7/3169888773/VEsP/ "http://www.sos.state.nm.us/Voter_Information/Voter_Registration_Information.aspx?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Check+your+voter+registration+status+her&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")**
---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b7a0/43d8135f/66f43ee7/510050a6/3169888773/VEsHBQ/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b7a0/43d8135f/66f43ee7/510050a9/3169888773/VEsHBA/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b7a0/43d8135f/66f43ee7/510050a8/3169888773/VEsHBw/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b7a0/43d8135f/66f43ee7/510050ab/3169888773/VEsHBg/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=13+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b7a0/43d8135f/66f43ee7/510050aa/3169888773/VEsHAQ/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_2_2").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: BREAKING@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: Trump's rally just finished
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
He's trying to sway this election.

| Donald Trump just finished his rally and he made it clear he's trying to defeat Tina. He made attack after attack against her. Then brought her opponent up on the stage. **Tina needs this team to stand behind her right now, friend. Pitch in $10 or whatever you are able tonight to show you 're standing with Tina against Trump's attacks: [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181004PM-2_em&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** He's trying to sway this election -- and control of the Senate. And with every poll showing this race in the single digits we can't afford to leave anything to chance. Counting on you, Team Tina

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: re: the recent poll results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I really need your help -- right now.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ea7/1a8421e1/19a6ffe68/49384811/363424199/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friend, _I really need your help -- right now._ As you can see from my team's note below, my far-right opponent released a new poll of our race, and the results are a reminder that this remains a highly competitive race, and we can take nothing for granted. According to this poll, **our race is within the margin of error, and my opponent is even claiming a narrow lead.** [**Can you make a donation right now, friend, to help me take back the lead?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") My campaign team and I are taking this threat very seriously, friend, and I hope you will too. We must be firing on all cylinders, all the way until the polls close on November 6th, or we are at risk of handing this seat over to the Republicans. We can't let that happen. And I am counting on you to make sure it doesn't. [**Please, if you can, make a donation of any size today to ensure we can beat back this threat and win on November 6th.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: Team O'Halleran Subject: NEW POLL _If you needed a reminder that Tom is the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, team -- we just got a big one:_ Our far-right opponent, Wendy Rogers, just released a SHOCK POLL showing _**Tom trailing by 3 points.**_ **We told you, team: This race is NOT over.** [**Can you rush a donation right here, right now, so we can keep up the fight and take back the lead so AZ-01 stays blue?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$25](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$50](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This poll shows that our race is still within the margin of error, so we're confident that we can come back and re-elect Tom in November -- _but we can 't make any assumptions. _We have to run this race like we're behind.

After all, Rogers is up on TV with misleading attacks on Tom's independent record, and she has shown that she is willing to lie to voters to take this seat. **And now that she has a poll showing her in the lead -- you can bet that outside Super PAC money is going to start pouring into our backyard to help her.**

We are counting on this grassroots team to keep up the fight, keep AZ-01 blue, and take back the House. [**Can you chip in?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Team O'Halleran

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ea7/1a8421e1/19a6ffe68/4938481b/363424199/VEsHAA/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ea7/1a8421e1/19a6ffe68/4938481c/363424199/VEsHAw/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: Ben Mitchell [Campaign Manager]
subject: Victory Rally with Tom Coburn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhjehk-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter, Make plans to join Mike Braun, candidate for US Senate, and former Senator Tom Coburn**this Thursday** in Indianapolis at the Republican Victory Office on North Meridian. Mike and Tom will be meeting with Hoosiers and discussing the next Republican Revolution. **You can view the invite below.** [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhjehk-kujulhlke-j/) **Mike and Tom look forward to the opportunity to talk to about the future of Republican politics and the top issues facing our nation.** See you Thursday, Ben Mitchell [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhjehk-kujulhlke-t/) |
---|---|---

name: Shane (Tabitha's Husband)
subject: You have changed her, Friend (A message from Tabitha's husband)
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

Dear Friend,

“What’s your wife up to tonight,” is a question I’m now asked frequently. Sometimes I have a good answer. Other times, I’ll admit, “Even I can’t keep up with her!” I mean, she’s not always gone, but she very often is and sometimes- I’ll confess- I wish we could grill out more often in our backyard, play soccer more often with our son, or even just binge watch more TV together.

But achieving the change we all want for this state takes putting Netflix off for a time and cheering for her in whatever she's up to next. Tonight I'll be cheering for her as she joins in the Homecoming parade in Union Springs.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/three%20of%20us_smaller.PNG]

I’ve thought some about homecomings in my career. I’m a church pastor. My tradition tells several stories about people coming home. Some of those went well. Some not so much. All share something, however. When people are gone for a while and come home, they change.

And while not all change is good, it can be. And I can’t tell you how glad I am for the change I’ve seen in my wife this past year. She’s more energized than ever about the promise of a better future. She’s more convinced our earth can be less polluted, our politics less divided, our communities represented more transparently, with less corruption and inequality.

The reason for that change, I believe, is all y’all. I constantly hear of Tabitha meeting grandmothers raising their voices to demand again the long arc of justice bend. I learn of vets she speaks with, who fought one war, sacrificing so those fighting today aren’t left behind. These voices are shaping her into a better candidate, soon a better representative.

Homecomings at the Isner home bubble with hope, and I have you to thank. So thank you!

And please don’t stop working, friends. Tabitha won’t. She never does. So if you too can knock on more doors, donate more money, register more voters, please do! Our Alabama home is too important to stay the same.

And it’s going to change. With you engaged, that change will be one we’re all proud to have made happen together.

Shane (Tabitha's husband)

Let's bring this home! Donate $25 today!

Donate Now! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2?emci=40ddae4d-e8c5-e811-af11-28187847c89e&emdi=cac9551c-94c8-e811-af11-28187847c89e&ceid=6898985&am=&contactdata=z4jbf4h4%2BC1vsNfD%2B%2FeCnJvXQmhgapP9JsWfylAXVs1zagfZ2fkYmuZg5WjKGrmY]

Connect With Us:
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner]
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK]

Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to:
PO Box 6340
Montgomery, AL 36106

Campaign HQ Address:
1460 Ann St.
Montgomery, AL 36107
Phone: 334-425-8626

subject: America’s Unemployment Rate Falls to Its Lowest Level in Almost 50 Years
body:
| |
---
#
# **_America’s Unemployment Rate Falls to Its Lowest Level in Almost 50 Years_**
#
The U.S. unemployment rate is now 3.7 percent, the lowest it has been since December 1969, according to monthly employment figures released this morning by the Bureau of Labor Statistics. Payroll employment also continued its historic streak of positive monthly jobs gains, and average weekly wages continued to rise in September. **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA1Ljk1ODQ4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNS45NTg0ODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1NzUwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/americas-unemployment-rate-falls-lowest-level-almost-50-years/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) ** “On this Manufacturing Day, Americans around the country can celebrate the growing manufacturing revival due to the tireless efforts of President Donald J. Trump and those in his Administration,” [**Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA1Ljk1ODQ4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNS45NTg0ODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1NzUwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/leveling-playing-field-american-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) writes in CNBC. Under President Trump, “year-over-year manufacturing job growth in 2018 increas[ed] at the fastest rate since 1995.” “Mrs. Trump is sending a powerful message by selecting the continent of Africa to embark upon her first major multi-country solo foreign trip as the first lady,” White House East Wing historian Jennifer Boswell Pickens writes in [**_The Daily Caller_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA1Ljk1ODQ4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNS45NTg0ODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1NzUwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://dailycaller.com/2018/10/02/the-power-mrs-trump-africa/). “The message is clear: She wants to address challenging and substantive issues both domestically and abroad. She is secure in her position and willing to spend her own political capital to take a stand for causes she cares about.” “Few Americans would say that they’re actually sick of winning, but you can add one more positive report to the recent run of upbeat readings on the nation’s economy,” James Freeman writes in [**_The Wall Street Journal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA1Ljk1ODQ4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNS45NTg0ODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1NzUwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/a-record-month-for-raises-1538671097). “NFIB Chief Economist William Dunkelberg says that a record 37% of small businesses in September ‘reported raising overall compensation in hopes of hiring and retaining needed employees.’” “The Trump administration, in a frenzy to kill Obama-era regulations and beyond, more than doubled its savings goal and is on a pace to make record cuts to rules the president claims are jobs killers,” Paul Bedard reports for the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA1Ljk1ODQ4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNS45NTg0ODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1NzUwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/washington-secrets/swift-slashing-of-obama-era-regulations-saves-more-than-2x-trumps-goal-1-65b). “The administration achieved $1.65 billion in regulatory savings, miles above its goal of $687 million,” a new independent report shows. “President Trump is all-action on prison reform. The Democrats? All-talk. In a matter of months, the president has done more for prison reform than Democrats managed to do in many, many years,” Pastor Darrell Scott writes in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA1Ljk1ODQ4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNS45NTg0ODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1NzUwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/2/trump-fulfills-his-promises-on-prison-reform/). “Unlike the all-talk-no-action Democrats, President Trump is actually fulfilling his promises, fighting to reform a system for those punished with harsh and excessive prison terms, and helping to integrate Americans who have already served their time back into their communities.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA1Ljk1ODQ4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNS45NTg0ODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1NzUwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA1Ljk1ODQ4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNS45NTg0ODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1NzUwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA1Ljk1ODQ4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNS45NTg0ODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1NzUwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_13)

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: President Trump's rally in Rochester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
President Trump was in Rochester last night.
It's his second campaign trip to Minnesota this election and just more proof that he's targeting our state in November, including my great colleague Tina Smith.
Remember what I've said all along: **we 're not just resisting, we're _insisting_ on a better way forward for Minnesota and the nation.**
So despite the rhetoric in Rochester, we'll be hanging on to our Minnesota values: hard work, getting things done, and treating each other with grace and dignity.
Because when we remember that we're all in this together, we can find common ground, break through the bickering, and get results.
**With the President targeting Minnesota, I need your help. Will you make a donation today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| | Friends,

Just announced! Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel will join Vice President Mike Pence [NEXT WEEK in Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=005c1378d4&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

**Ronna McDaniel, the former Michigan Republican Party chair -- who is now leading the RNC to a record fundraising year -- will be a special guest at the 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner!**

With Vice President Pence coming back home again, this event is nearly sold out. _**We only have a few seats left.**_ And now with Chairwoman McDaniel also making the trip to Indiana, _I know we'll run out of seats at the JW Marriott in Indianapolis ASAP_.

**If you're planning to attend this major event leading up to this year's historic midterm election, you'll need to[secure your tickets NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=89036f1790&e=1acd9bb3d6), or else risk missing out. **

See you, Vice President Pence, and Chairwoman McDaniel on October 12!

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Heidi Heitkamp is a "NO" on Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friends -- The first full-Senate vote on Judge Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court could be as early as today.
In an act that truly puts country before politics, Senator Heidi Heitkamp just shared that she will be voting "no" on his confirmation.
Donald Trump won Heidi's state of North Dakota by over 30 points so to say that her decision on this vote was difficult would be a massive understatement.
I don't know what the result of the vote will ultimately be, but I do know that the only way we can keep Heidi fighting in the Senate is to support her campaign. That's why I have to ask:
[**Please make an urgent donation -- $3 or as much as you're able -- to Heidi Heitkamp's reelection campaign. Polls show her behind, and she needs our help right now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1aa/2a380d31/306a7bf3/f15873/2741636735/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMDVfTVdINEhIMV82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181005_MWH4HH1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
This choice proves that more than ever, we need Heidi's voice in the Senate to continue speaking out and standing up for women.
I'm grateful for Heidi's courage and her resolve to do the right thing, no matter the attacks she's sure to face.
This fight isn't over yet, and Heidi needs our help more than ever before. [**Will you please give $3 or whatever feels right for you to her campaign? A donation would be the perfect way to thank her for her vote and with just a month until the election, there has never been a more critical time.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1aa/2a380d31/306a7bf3/f15873/2741636735/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMDVfTVdINEhIMV82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181005_MWH4HH1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1aa/2a380d31/306a7bf3/f1587c/2741636735/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMDVfTVdINEhIMV82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181005_MWH4HH1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Kaine
subject: The Senate is holding its first floor vote on Kavanaugh today. It's infuriating. But we can focus our energy somewhere: Voters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, the list of things wrong right now can feel overwhelming. But as of right now, there really is only one plan of recourse: Voting out President Trump's agenda-pushers ------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1079/3e0906/768c59c5/3e37aa55/1678289840/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&source=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Angry about the first Kavanaugh vote happening today? **Vote in November.**
Worried about protecting the Mueller investigation? **Vote in November.**
Furious that so many families are still separated? **Vote in November.**

Derek, the list of things wrong right now can feel overwhelming. But as of right now, there really is only one plan of recourse: [Voting out President Trump's agenda-pushers and voting in a Democratic majority.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1079/3e0906/768c59c5/3e37aa54/1678289840/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Voting+out+President+Trumprsquos+agendap&utm_campaign=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&source=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry")

**Right now as we speak, Virginians are filling out their absentee ballots and votes are being cast for the 2018 midterm elections.**

And our team is out there registering new voters: [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1079/3e0906/768c59c5/3e37aaab/1678289840/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&source=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry") We know you'll get your vote in, Derek, but it's just not enough to stop there. Each of us needs to help make sure everybody knows that whatever they want to change, _it starts with voting in November._ To win a majority, it will take a majority.

Derek, if you're in Virginia [register to vote](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1079/3e0906/768c59c5/3e37aaaa/1678289840/VEsC/ "https://iwillvote.com/va?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+register+to+vote&utm_campaign=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&source=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry"), [request an absentee ballot](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1079/3e0906/768c59c5/3e37aaa9/1678289840/VEsD/ "https://www.elections.virginia.gov/casting-a-ballot/absentee-voting/index.html?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+request+an+absentee+ballot&utm_campaign=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&source=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry"), or [confirm your polling place](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1079/3e0906/768c59c5/3e37aaa8/1678289840/VEsA/ "https://iwillvote.com/va?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+confirm+your+polling+place&utm_campaign=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&source=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry").

**Not in Virginia or already set with your plan to vote?[Donate to our Get Out the Vote Fund to make sure we turn out every last voter between now and Election Day.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1079/3e0906/768c59c5/3e37aaaf/1678289840/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Donate+to+our+Get+Out+the+Vote+Fund+to+m&utm_campaign=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry&source=20181005_1_FR_TEAM_angry")**

Let's get to work,

subject: Endorsed by the Sun Sentinel ✅📰
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7qDQnoqtvDMC40RgMuqq1nPqJ2muRA50VhdKGttKdT8=/rI-g3lgym9pLzip2LxavLeo6kASLPe294SBaJ69VlgQ=) Friends and Neighbors -- I have some more exciting news to share -- our campaign has just received the endorsement of __ the _Sun Sentinel! _ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7qDQnoqtvDMC40RgMuqq1nPqJ2muRA50VhdKGttKdT8=/4zaApvg6PogAZsnJLu45ZHbxG7KaqAVgoqg9rG4_EC0=) [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7qDQnoqtvDMC40RgMuqq1nPqJ2muRA50VhdKGttKdT8=/_EgNGaqaOHVRerSn1w9jTU72pgD4g7PHF0L8JnuxOtU=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) In recommending Jeremy to be our next Chief Financial Officer (CFO), the Sentinel wrote that "Democrat Jeremy Ring offers relevant experience and new ideas. Republican Jimmy Patronis offers far less experience and lots of platitudes." The Sentinel also noted that "in some ways, the chief financial officer is the most important member of the Florida Cabinet". In recommending Jeremy for the role, the Sentinel pointed out that current CFO Patronis' "other 'qualification' was that he supported Scott in 2010."

Additionally, the Sentinel highlighted that Patronis has "appeared to carry out Scott's dirty work by forcing out the state's top financial regulator", also citing his support for harmful legislation that eased important environmental regulations and how he "joined other Scott appointees in approving what the utilities wanted." [**(Click here to read the full recommendation).**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7qDQnoqtvDMC40RgMuqq1nPqJ2muRA50VhdKGttKdT8=/4zaApvg6PogAZsnJLu45ZHbxG7KaqAVgoqg9rG4_EC0=) **The Sentinel 's message is similar to ours - Jeremy would be the check and balance we need in the Cabinet - to help bring about some much needed change in Tallahassee**.
The Sentinel's endorsement is just anther example of our momentum in this race. But as we count down the days to November 6th, every single dollar will count towards our success in getting out Jeremy's message of accountability and an innovation economy and getting out the _**VOTE.**_ **

And we cannot get there without your help.** **[Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help us keep this momentum going - and get Jeremy into the Cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/7qDQnoqtvDMC40RgMuqq1nPqJ2muRA50VhdKGttKdT8=/_EgNGaqaOHVRerSn1w9jTU72pgD4g7PHF0L8JnuxOtU=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Anthony Pardal** Campaign Manager - Jeremy Ring for Florida CFO | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: Jason Yates
subject: Rev. Samuel Rodriguez addresses Immigration
body:
| | Reconciling the Central Tension of the Immigration Debate
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvMvlHMBnb4oP8RyQO6IdqcapS-WUr_PT_pBv8g9xgS99UNMfBIXn4iTE0Kdt_hbqHa24WFRP22esUG7bu1PCEp6WiA_b-TSFwWat7icf_mzOQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181005com01&n=1)
| Peter, Immigration is one of the many important topics being discussed this election season. We wanted to look at this issue from a biblical perspective and through the lens of a pastoral worldview. Our friend, Reverend Samuel Rodriguez is the president of the National Hispanic Christian Leadership Conference and is also a My Faith Votes influencer. In his article with My Faith Votes, **[Reconciling the Central Tension of the Immigration Debate](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvMvlHMBnb4oP8RyQO6IdqcapS-WUr_PT_pBv8g9xgS99UNMfBIXn4iTE0Kdt_hbqHa24WFRP22esUG7bu1PCEp6WiA_b-TSFwWat7icf_mzOQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181005com01&n=2),** he answers many of the difficult immigration questions our nation is challenged with today. _“Politically speaking, comprehensive immigration reform is perhaps the ultimate Catch-22: Do we enforce the rule-of-law with people who have entered our country illegally? Or, do we compassionately assimilate undocumented peoples despite having broken our laws getting here in the first place? I believe there are 5 essential policy points that must be included in any serious, comprehensive immigration reform bill that seeks to resolve this central tension while simultaneously bridging the two political parties’ discordant objectives.”_
–Rev. Samuel Rodriguez Take a few minutes to read his [**article**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvMvlHMBnb4oP8RyQO6IdqcapS-WUr_PT_pBv8g9xgS99UNMfBIXn4iTE0Kdt_hbqHa24WFRP22esUG7bu1PCEp6WiA_b-TSFwWat7icf_mzOQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181005com01&n=3) today to gain a deeper understanding of the issue and learn of possible solutions. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvMvlHMBnb4oP8RyQO6IdqcapS-WUr_PT_pBv8g9xgS99UNMfBIXn4iTE0Kdt_hbqHa24WFRP22esUG7bu1PCEp6WiA_b-TSFwWat7icf_mzOQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181005com01&n=4) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181005com01&n=5)
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181005com01&n=6).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4syIdVRw_HYS0jEt2wMUQx2eEuRFK5ZOguLktpeYbxh9N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181005com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FPXYBx5Xyt4ogPU1qeCocIOlLGlV2jWcvDCbIYySOYm8m4a6nxzoW0Ja2quI4O6s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181005com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GevmR3RZALWcgxRmRAu8Xs945EaPwemE7bkwg1RsifpjRSkA2HhVJBLM7TbCqLQ4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181005com01&n=9)

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2492269/14390380/424476708?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTRiMTE3MC1jNGM4LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AR_dVuGzzrg2UO3gRS3U2laXgoQ-1jKam-kwCY2St5w=)
Hey Peter,

These upcoming midterm elections are among the most important in our lifetime, and we all need to do our part to fix Congress and course correct our government.

We need to ensure that our voices are heard in elections up and down the ballot this cycle, and the only way to do that is by voting! Too much is at stake to stay home.

[**_Our team has set a goal of recruiting 2,500 PLEDGED midterm voters by Saturday when it will officially be one month from Election Day. Can you click here to make your pledge to vote today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2492270/14390381/237522569?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTRiMTE3MC1jNGM4LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AR_dVuGzzrg2UO3gRS3U2laXgoQ-1jKam-kwCY2St5w=&emci=1574c347-12c8-e811-af11-28187847c89e&emdi=454b1170-c4c8-e811-af11-28187847c89e&ceid=2478574&contactdata=Pm27PMSs3lKfB%2Bxy16FEI9LinrLwS8wZL%2FDWpKW2bPxUQtBUg9E0ihX7NKxfr8ZsuXQw1W6lc2v7%2FIdzGvQv0Wz7ddvDTK%2F3%2FCnRDF9ooU76o0%2FcNwkgDWtx7PZi3JPj)
[PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2492271/14390382/237522569?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTRiMTE3MC1jNGM4LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AR_dVuGzzrg2UO3gRS3U2laXgoQ-1jKam-kwCY2St5w=&emci=1574c347-12c8-e811-af11-28187847c89e&emdi=454b1170-c4c8-e811-af11-28187847c89e&ceid=2478574&contactdata=Pm27PMSs3lKfB%2Bxy16FEI9LinrLwS8wZL%2FDWpKW2bPxUQtBUg9E0ihX7NKxfr8ZsuXQw1W6lc2v7%2FIdzGvQv0Wz7ddvDTK%2F3%2FCnRDF9ooU76o0%2FcNwkgDWtx7PZi3JPj)
There have never been more important midterm elections than these, Peter. We’ve all heard talk about Democrats being energized and a blue wave building, **but all the change we want to see comes down to voter turnout.**

[**_That’s why we’re recruiting 2,500 pledged voters by Saturday. Click here to make the pledge now →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2492272/14390383/237522569?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTRiMTE3MC1jNGM4LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AR_dVuGzzrg2UO3gRS3U2laXgoQ-1jKam-kwCY2St5w=&emci=1574c347-12c8-e811-af11-28187847c89e&emdi=454b1170-c4c8-e811-af11-28187847c89e&ceid=2478574&contactdata=Pm27PMSs3lKfB%2Bxy16FEI9LinrLwS8wZL%2FDWpKW2bPxUQtBUg9E0ihX7NKxfr8ZsuXQw1W6lc2v7%2FIdzGvQv0Wz7ddvDTK%2F3%2FCnRDF9ooU76o0%2FcNwkgDWtx7PZi3JPj)

Congress is shaped by voters like you, because your government should represent your needs.

Let’s get ready for November.

—Dan

Let’s get ready for November. —Dan | | Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible. Dan Lipinski for Congress P.O. Box 520 Western Springs, IL 60558 United States

name: Tori Taylor
subject: (!!!) Budd's first attack ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Help us fill our Rapid Response Fund!
|
---

| | **Rep. Ted Budd just launched his first attack ad against Kathy.** We don't know how much Budd's spending. We don't know how long the attack will run. _But we do know we have to respond with overwhelming grassroots strength -- and we need to do it NOW._ [**Can you help us get $10,000 into our Rapid Response Fund in the next 24 hours to fight against his newest attack?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427963/e3b7d3/5eead059/25555501/1935251820/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181004?refcode=kme181004_m&recurring=true") Budd's getting desperate. He wouldn't spend money attacking Kathy if he wasn't seeing numbers that show him in trouble. A recent poll showed Kathy ahead. Three separate news organizations upgraded our race as a "toss-up." It's getting more and more obvious that families in this district are getting tired of his bought-and-paid-for special interest agenda. **And Budd's desperately trying to hang onto his job by tearing Kathy down.** The sad truth is, attacks like this can work if they go unanswered. [**We CANNOT let that happen. Rush in a contribution and help us get $10,000 into our Rapid Response Fund.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427963/e3b7d3/5eead059/25555501/1935251820/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181004?refcode=kme181004_m&recurring=true") We're thiiiiiis close to the end of this campaign. We've come so far, bringing this from a long-shot race to a toss-up. Let's make sure we have all the resources we need to bring home a win. | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427963/e3b7d3/5eead059/25555501/1935251820/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181004?refcode=kme181004_m&recurring=true")
---
Thanks!
Tori

name: MK
subject: A message for Chris Sununu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
We've officially begun our final push, friends.
If you've been wondering when the right time to give is, _it's now._ **[_I need you to give $5 - or whatever you can spare - right now to help me flip New Hampshire blue._](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc49f2/d0ce7de/50568e68/9cd91a6/205283594/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjAwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk200-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'll be honest with you: Some people believe I'm the underdog in this race. I'm up against Chris Sununu and the deep pockets of his wealthy corporate donors who are doing everything they can to make sure they're able to keep pushing their agenda in the Granite State.
**But I've got a message for Chris Sununu and his right-wing corporate allies:** ** **
**_Do not underestimate me and the power of this grassroots campaign._**
We're going to show everyone what is possible this year. **That's why I need you to give right now to reach our $10,000 goal before midnight so we can head strongly into November and flip New Hampshire blue. **
[Friends, we need to raise $10,000 before midnight if we're going to pull off this win. Please, give $5 or more right now.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc49f2/d0ce7de/50568e68/9cd91a6/205283594/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjAwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk200-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

clean_body: Derek, There have been a lot of headlines coming out of D.C. that have made us angry and frustrated, but this one hits closer to home: This is the second time Hassan's office has greatly embarrassed our state - this year. This isn't a partisan issue, this is an issue of professional decorum and office management. The office behavior Senator Hassan has enabled in D.C. is completely unacceptable, and is damaging New Hampshire's reputation across the nation. Senator Hassan isn't on the ballot this year, but her left wing allies Chris Pappas, Ann Kuster, and Molly Kelly are. A big Republican turnout for Eddie Edwards, Steve Negron, and Chris Sununu will make sure Hassan and her liberal, mismanaged office will hear us loud and clear. \- and all misguided Democrats \- get the Right message this November? Team NHGOP | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

If you've been wondering how you can make a real difference for Ben before Election Day, it's easy: [**Sign up to volunteer right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378f24/7ab0e2c4/7e0ba376/349829cd/2363807989/VEsE/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/dAEdxbI5W0Gwgm9R3SBZdw2?ms=em_jealous_20181005") You might be a seasoned volunteer or a first-timer -- either way, you can really help in this last stretch to Election Day. name: Jeanne
subject: what happened yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Yesterday, my friend Heidi Heitkamp showed immense character and courage. She announced that she would be voting "no" on Brett Kavanaugh's nomination - a vote based on her conscience, not politics.

This is exactly why we need Heidi in the Senate, but she's in the fight of her life, and after this vote the GOP is only going to dig its heels in to defeat her and replace her with a right-wing extremist. (**[Click here right now to give $5 and help Heidi win in North Dakota.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk916-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**)

**Nate Silver's __ FiveThirtyEight is predicting that a voter in North Dakota will be __twenty-eight _times_ likelier to decide Senate control in November. **

That means everything is riding on what happens in North Dakota, but recent polling shows Heidi trailing her GOP opponent, and 23 right-wing groups are spending $10.5 million to defeat her.

Heidi's race in 2012 was the closest Senate race that year - she won by less than 3,000 votes - so she needs our immediate grassroots support to fight back against Mitch McConnell and the GOP's deep-pocketed donors.
**I told Heidi we could help her raise another $15,000 before midnight - so I'm counting on top supporters like you to step up immediately and help Heidi close the gap now. ****[Please, will you donate $5 right now to reelect Heidi Heitkamp in North Dakota and take back the Senate for Democrats in November?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk916-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**

___If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Heidi Heitkamp and Jeanne Shaheen:___ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk916-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk916-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk916-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk916-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,

Jeanne

name: Leah
subject: only one month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Winning in November could be the difference between a Republican majority in the Senate, or a liberal one. And if you think the way things are......

Friend, in 32 days, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country.

You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not.

Winning in November could be the difference between a Republican majority in the Senate, or a liberal one. And if you think the way things are going in the Senate are bad now, can you IMAGINE if they gain even one more seat?

It’ll be awful, friend. Total gridlock and obstruction - fighting President Trump’s entire agenda in any way possible. And Tammy Baldwin would be right there with them - choosing her out-of-state, liberal donors over Wisconsin just like she’s done this entire year.

We have to stand up now, defend our Republican majority, and DEFEAT Tammy Baldwin to bring the Wisconsin way to Washington.

Friend, we need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda. We just can't afford to lose this race!

That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this thing.

If you can chip in today to help us build our funds in these final weeks, we'll be one step closer to victory.

Please, stand up with me today and help keep us going full speed ahead until November 6th. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4b4f09d27a634f14bb0b04f0c19bb3d6&_e=dJy9OoYxJxyUS8ksUGclUsVjnbaI66XIo2pVN80B7vH0omFpMDr3-NasjeM-pHjfYxIhSwBZWvyOI3ENkPIVToz7rcZRiewoZQVLFRQeWVvh0W221R7SAcfJWDCheE2fWfC-tUlt5pf_7KQZb-qmOvzfTARi3Dnx6ScPb-YeqOpwkcmZ5LcmKCFplTcpfmpdYDv51MI6vITZb--lw9yt8b05JVT-CsBkx_TycHzpv0aCuZvE7qUHZDXmN2AZMDIS). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4b4f09d27a634f14bb0b04f0c19bb3d6&_e=5Hd_8foTsl5ws8zd-iA7OSqVSj-rhD6w6ulVkfDXD2qjIiViGjyR9rWir3M0LtjkVBkUJ-GHfC1WSwApm3YB2OH5dT-SaxHDtWN1mm_ho91NySqnZOhhi_h3lDhDLn9xz0qhXfkTZQirLOyS3EmGm3vGufVXYem3frw9MTlz4j6KHuUspC4yaFkrjKKkQ4LJ2I0Xb7N_2HjRVxM7lyfUyMS_pKkGYnJNz0WSIDFGnRnFYafWXCF8EvTfrEFrQ8FgwpUCkOvDdwrbQx2G2gKRgqdQ1W0pKZc_COy6X9X4CaNE4hxyX15CaH0Z-RXfKCiVX7jR9fXAbPfaVeU86eNbSZlDKTLXnQgeH7zx99qyWs1275SCcQWiW5F3ZJ6SWEai) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4b4f09d27a634f14bb0b04f0c19bb3d6&_e=5Hd_8foTsl5ws8zd-iA7OSqVSj-rhD6w6ulVkfDXD2oGNysMCWitRzQIU6WrAI7k0zMS3kC3lPor8_Js0dYrEedGhYTo57JWKyF_xmPr4pbtmJB5LVo6bxHh08r-eHPFMrasFUAANYh65gmKaVNoXJMt3fH8V88X0jwEkXKFTAIRbtTASL4RoWvL1CCSByGHDxTC_pqCpdQWneROncgEOXt3fNxGsWTyPSukpwuLkvW69GtlOMKBZVy1wfmq2vG3zu8K_5hMyuhP7O5EHCzZcpDNRRlGp6STSxd4UXCFyoOKsJWeRAZ9_PnKArQxq87eKvsZD2npVfiwfq6pDme9fro8mIQZ1iYxgmrvrZRBNFI1nHTlp1g9KM8Kn0nkXWMN) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4b4f09d27a634f14bb0b04f0c19bb3d6&_e=5Hd_8foTsl5ws8zd-iA7OfAdNEMp89ZbK7gK0Govx4MWztCMyYznjjnzqewxHLLntikyBFakXDg_u3n3jpy-_3C7EqV6w5RCcDFH_FiP7OL9XycHgLTMGPPZ03GBLWfgGfc7-iOcMjnFHXLizT32tzhLpzLDFVA-ebNq7ShPlwfNZBdnJQjrj73RSSs8uAF1_-GOrSTDStcRWhhQda6wGbTyTssdQ889r8xn8v68EkX9r1wdRv0EzHj94VzP_b50hH0fAM-Zxny83n9ZTv8-tQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4b4f09d27a634f14bb0b04f0c19bb3d6&_e=5Hd_8foTsl5ws8zd-iA7OXcgB_c6bNO9CiQj-sWWQl7yrDoLMg3AosleO-yqssc-wK1zSWj_SIxb5SJu1jKPbqDjJxxY4g_OnMcq5hNYPBDSDQonSOhqQ1voQvqJPjZ7qbR4GFcjnpzlXfJuKP6uIxntd9kdKcyFJoOfw4AJEJ5epc1HNKFdexZdCKplv9Q44CYkEeiur6ZMdIhf-pH1qVtkwerLURQErqt4IrvY0eiZDBGX_mE-GBKR6Qq17QgtsWv3_1YIbxMC2bxyKMP1aQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4b4f09d27a634f14bb0b04f0c19bb3d6&_e=5Hd_8foTsl5ws8zd-iA7OREQY0ymSTMRlva8bildHucZqtbwMI94meXGZ-J5xoR9s31WdJEKNiHiUMR8W7Y2mTbc5mUcC5kQ1tBHWYKf_RG0SGe0Kwho9GFHZkrTqhgwfTz7Do58EZtOjvufdxycUF_x2aiWfsew4S6Sd9w1PNwZn1fN4rF05tko0qW4B4fi5aErgtrbNlwJERLmKK5luSgl9SNObWZsiiszyEnEzWOhLrjemtv2uYR-WPNriyJkZ3qc03ns5x6-gxm9ch20eg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4b4f09d27a634f14bb0b04f0c19bb3d6&_e=5Hd_8foTsl5ws8zd-iA7OSqVSj-rhD6w6ulVkfDXD2q564B7epsO7Qa9R6we7RMv2Uh5oZokhieWEcB-zuiRnb4pVKMjmwrBi259GHs873aFpvWreGIXdi7c7gwwYAJCkhOEomuoo6z6T05nXGJlILY7G7stQzZhAC5OyO4wP-SrveF4P_nbv6uD96iVO-l9Agk8HEx1YNlTf3tJD2dunOdsU2PWHHehhXVSLFF6LQfx0O3zfI-HwLTy0tble1-CVahS59xDOLcOhe11xsBQR1ZIJ4r8uw3oosJeDJvsQUQqAmoMY4H7snV5fjMXxXkdBIvDbcSR3pPXU1g1VmdF11hz6ufq4OR1936aCBLbtJ4yyec9Od5_ihn3C_Cyx06Z-_l0OLHcd-uPnq7fTpxNoA%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4b4f09d27a634f14bb0b04f0c19bb3d6&_e=dJy9OoYxJxyUS8ksUGclUsVjnbaI66XIo2pVN80B7vH0omFpMDr3-NasjeM-pHjfYxIhSwBZWvyOI3ENkPIVToz7rcZRiewoZQVLFRQeWVvh0W221R7SAcfJWDCheE2fWfC-tUlt5pf_7KQZb-qmOvzfTARi3Dnx6ScPb-YeqOpwkcmZ5LcmKCFplTcpfmpdYDv51MI6vITZb--lw9yt8b05JVT-CsBkx_TycHzpv0aCuZvE7qUHZDXmN2AZMDIS) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4b4f09d27a634f14bb0b04f0c19bb3d6&_e=dJy9OoYxJxyUS8ksUGclUsVjnbaI66XIo2pVN80B7vH0omFpMDr3-NasjeM-pHjfYxIhSwBZWvyOI3ENkPIVToz7rcZRiewoZQVLFRQeWVvh0W221R7SAcfJWDCheE2fWfC-tUlt5pf_7KQZb-qmOvzfTARi3Dnx6ScPb-YeqOpwkcmZ5LcmKCFplTcpfmpdYDv51MI6vITZb--lw9yt8b05JVT-CsBkx_TycHzpv0aCuZvE7qUHZDXmN2AZMDIS) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Winning in November could be the difference between a Republican majority in the Senate, or a liberal one. And if you think the way things are...... Friend, in 32 days, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country. You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not. Winning in November could be the difference between a Republican majority in the Senate, or a liberal one. And if you think the way things are going in the Senate are bad now, can you IMAGINE if they gain even one more seat? It’ll be awful, friend. Total gridlock and obstruction - fighting President Trump’s entire agenda in any way possible. And Tammy Baldwin would be right there with them - choosing her out-of-state, liberal donors over Wisconsin just like she’s done this entire year. We have to stand up now, defend our Republican majority, and DEFEAT Tammy Baldwin to bring the Wisconsin way to Washington. Friend, we need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda. We just can't afford to lose this race! That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this thing. If you can chip in today to help us build our funds in these final weeks, we'll be one step closer to victory. Please, stand up with me today and help keep us going full speed ahead until November 6th. Contribute today: I am counting on you. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=250387b3b9&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=250387b3b9&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Friend,
---
| At a time when our nation is so divided and polarized, it’s clear to me that Vermont can set an example for the country to follow. That’s why my first ad for the General Election calls on all of us to rise above partisanship, be better role models and treat all people with dignity and respect. It’s important we don’t let our differences and disagreements divide us. We must, instead, lead by example and show our youth how to engage in important, complex, and sometimes emotional debates with both conviction and civility. We can prove that the strength of our nation is in its diversity of people and opinion; that America is a global beacon of personal and economic freedom and opportunity. And we can demonstrate that listening to, and learning from, each other is how we make the most progress as a nation and state. I’ve never run a negative campaign in my life, and that won’t change now, or ever. I’ve always treated others with the respect and dignity they deserve, regardless of what’s said about me. And I’ve always made decisions based on what I believe is the right thing to do for Vermont and Vermonters, regardless of the political consequences. I hope in these trying times, we can all pull together and recommit to doing things the right way — the Vermont way — because our future depends on it. All the best,

Phil Scott
---

| | | Martin reached out yesterday asking for help supplying our volunteers before our weekend organizing starts, and I want to update you on our progress.

**We still have around $9,000 to raise by midnight tonight, and hitting this goal will decide whether or not we 'll have to scale back our plans before New Mexico's voter registration deadline -- and that would be BAD NEWS. _[We could really use your help to keep our organizers and volunteers running full steam ahead.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+We+could+really+use+your+help+to+keep+ou&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181005_1_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181005_1_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181005_1_3")_**

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+SUPPORT+OUR+ORGANIZERS+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181005_1_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181005_1_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181005_1_3")**

Please, can you contribute $29 or more to help our grassroots team keep up their great work before the voter registration deadline in four days?](http://nm.martinheinrich. name: JoeforIndiana.com
subject: You + Joe Biden
body:
Do you have your ticket to see VP Joe Biden in Hammond yet? |
---
| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d17/7377f838/3901e065/51f8e8e8/1693187419/VEsH/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")
---
**Vice President Joe Biden is joining Senator Joe Donnelly on Friday, October 12 to rally Hoosiers to the polls![Will you join us, Peter?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d17/7377f838/3901e065/51f8e8e8/1693187419/VEsE/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")**
Friday, October 12
Hammond Civic Center
5825 Sohl Ave., Hammond, IN 46320

Doors open at 4:00 pm (CT)
Rally begins at 5:00 pm (CT)

**Event is FREE, but you must register in advance.**

**********[**GET TICKETS**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d17/7377f838/3901e065/51f8e8e8/1693187419/VEsF/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")**********
---

**__Please read the following important information.__**

Only four tickets per registration. Ticket registration will close at 12 p.m. on Thursday, October 11. **Tickets are required for entry.**

Tickets will be available for pickup at Indiana Democratic Party Coordinated Campaign **[field offices](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d17/7377f838/3901e065/51f8e8eb/1693187419/VEsC/ "https://joeforindiana.com/offices/")** on Wednesday and Thursday, October 10-11 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. and Friday, October 12 from 9 a.m. to 12 p.m. **You must pick up your ticket at a field office. You cannot receive your ticket by email.**

_Media must respond to press@joeforindiana.com by 12 p.m. on Thursday, October 11, to be credentialed to cover this event. Riser space will be available on a first-come, first-served basis._

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Donnelly for Indiana, Indiana Democratic Congressional Victory Committee, and Hoosiers First PAC.
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d17/7377f838/3901e065/51f8e8ea/1693187419/VEsD/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: ACTION-ALERT@bobcasey.com
subject: You won't believe what Bob's opponent just said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
**_"The only thing that's going to stop me from beating Bob Casey right now is money."_**
\-- Congressman Lou Barletta **Rush $5 or more to stand with Bob:** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181005_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

You read that right, team: Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, admitted that money will be the name of the game these last few weeks before Election Day. And you know what? _He's right._

**_[With only 32 days to go, Bob needs resources to share his message with voters across the Commonwealth. Can you give $5 or more to defend Bob today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181005_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181005_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") Barletta has ads on air around the state, and far-right special interest groups just dropped a disgusting attack ad against Bob. The president praised his pal Lou earlier this week, and he just announced that he is coming back to PA to campaign for Barletta in _just four days_. Last time the president headlined a rally for him, Barletta raised an estimated _$1 million_ , so we have to take this seriously.

**_[Grassroots supporters like you can beat a campaign like Barletta's, and he knows it. Can you donate $5 -- or whatever you can give -- to send Bob back to the Senate?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181005_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181005_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181005_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Team Menendez
subject: Seriously? Now Hugin is against science?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Once a Trump stooge, always a Trump stooge.

Earlier this week Bob Hugin once again let us know that he's putting Trump above New Jerseyans, by **saying that Trump was right to withdraw from the Paris Climate Agreement.** All while wildfires ravage the West coast and hurricanes repeatedly rip through the Eastern seaboard.

Who could honestly deny the effects of climate change and how it is threatening our future? Bob Hugin and Donald Trump, that's who.

[**We can 't afford to let Bob Hugin win this election and bring his anti-science, pro-Trump agenda to the U.S. Senate. Contribute $5 or more today if you agree that we need a senator who will listen to scientists and protect our planet.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cd6/3af3c5d/39522919/4ec33626/774358133/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_parisclimateaccord?gpsid=5_73_4176&refcode=em18_181005_Paris_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181005_Paris_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+We+canrsquot+afford+to+let+Bob+Hugin+win")

Withdrawing from the Paris Climate Accord was a dangerous move. Climate change is real and is affecting our planet every single day. After the devastating effects of Hurricane Sandy on our home state, the people of New Jersey know this all too well.

Bob Hugin's commitment to Trump, against the people of New Jersey, and his denial of basic scientific evidence makes him unfit to serve in the United States Senate.

Democratic Senator Bob Menendez believes climate change is real, and that it is an imminent threat that we must address - that is why he is fighting every single day to make sure that our state and country are addressing the problem.

Our future generations depend on it.

[**If you stand with Bob Menendez and believe in science, chip in $5 or more today to help him defeat Bob Hugin in November.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cd6/3af3c5d/39522919/4ec33619/774358133/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_parisclimateaccord?gpsid=5_73_4176&refcode=em18_181005_Paris_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181005_Paris_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+If+you+stand+with+Bob+Menendez+and+belie")

Thank you,

Team Menendez

**[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cd6/3af3c5d/39522919/4ec33618/774358133/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_parisclimateaccord?gpsid=5_73_4176&refcode=em18_181005_Paris_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181005_Paris_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Donate")**

| Paid for by Menendez for Senate

Bob Hugin's commitment to Trump, against the people of New Jersey, and his denial of basic scientific evidence makes him unfit to serve in the United States Senate. Democratic Senator Bob Menendez believes climate change is real, and that it is an imminent threat that we must address - that is why he is fighting every single day to make sure that our state and country are addressing the problem. Our future generations depend on it. "" Thank you, Team Menendez "" | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""

subject: Everything we’ve got

body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Can you feel the energy? Just this week, we launched win.betofortexas.com:
an interactive map of data that helps everyone across Texas visualize our
plan to engage Texas voters and fight for the future of our country.

Our plan to win is ambitious -- and it has to be if we’re going to unseat
Ted Cruz. Now, our incredible volunteers on the ground are getting ready
to execute the plan and talk to as many voters as they can during our
first ‘get out the vote’ weekend (which starts tomorrow). See for
yourself!

name: Leah
subject: liberal playbook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Years ago, I joked that I wanted to take Iron Lady Margaret Thatcher’s idea of starting a “rent a spine” business. Right now, it looks like that would

Friend,

Years ago, I joked that I wanted to take Iron Lady Margaret Thatcher’s idea of starting a “rent a spine” business. Right now, it looks like that would be a successful business in the U.S. Senate!

The liberal playbook is in full force. The whole media spectacle, the delay tactics, obstructions, virtue signaling, smears, and hyperbole are now reaching the point of chaos in Washington.

And I'm not just talking about Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation saga.

These extremist liberal elites turn into professional schemers whenever their party fails at the ballot box. They've done it in Wisconsin to distract from conservative success and force our leaders to back down, and they're doing it now for the same reason.

Of course, our own Senator Tammy Baldwin is right there with them – arm in arm as they do everything they can to prevent a successful conservative agenda.

And there's only one way to stop the chaos. It's by electing conservatives to elect leaders we can rely on — leaders who will stand up to the liberal playbook. Leaders like me, who won't fall in line with the extreme agenda of Washington elites.
[JOIN ME TO DEFEAT LIBERAL ELITES: $25](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1BTej6dZwy01n8-WaJXBqTrKeLyAthzOgBZQqf9Eq3KPVHP0sIHRolI2Wg8F-hLAx06SCEZxPEi1kY3t0SI9kl9wvLXlGq-OAtS5kYXMdYn1TZUK9X91HamVUemcyftpmhBu5S3ljXwcDuthdA_a_u9Pov7LkMNJTXKQMGrfqlg3jlC7Z0eQ4q5vUaKpGx9eNplEBJ-ZrsXiH82HUxo2w7-a2D7e9vBFaUPN8RVss417DPotsR9Fm96Sb1CTwG5YKOqFm3CB8cnKtYV68EASq3V9rDiwZzonG8TVHDFulaIiq7hNuxto4L7InHMCzpc5oKMqFANhCujgFGM3jxLbHIViK-o8ybu60reFTDL-wtsNqQoCVBogk2OYKF9u4w-KnZBD5EjHMp_f0cbYBLaFYGY%3D)
---

Like many in middle America, I’m sick of watching important reforms and nominations get to the Senate floor just to be blocked at the last minute — by those who fall prey to the left’s games.

If we had leaders we could rely on, Obamacare would be repealed, and solutions to address high premiums without sacrificing quality of care would be implemented.

I know I can change Washington — that's not just talk.

I changed Wisconsin already! I took on an incumbent Democrat and won to become the deciding vote in the bold economic reforms that improved our state economy.

Now, I see myself in a position where I can’t sit on the sidelines anymore when America needs senators who will enact real change. We need to confirm Judge Kavanaugh and send Senator Baldwin packing.

Today, I'm hoping you'll chip in to help me do it: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1BTej6dZwy01n8-WaJXBqTrKeLyAthzOgBZQqf9Eq3KPVHP0sIHRolI2Wg8F-hLAx06SCEZxPEi1kY3t0SI9kl9wvLXlGq-OAtS5kYXMdYn1TZUK9X91HamVUemcyftpmhBu5S3ljXwcDuthdA_a_u9Pov7LkMNJTXKQMGrfqlg3jlC7Z0eQ4q5vUaKpGx9eNvoSQxqbZzyvg6M1bBiEG2U6ljR94hLkOYmvBVTIq5EBSyLMHzXaqLSM6C7p6PMT42soRzKf5ZVHs1hWwWA8nL6xuA6A5Bz9VaupFmbViaoATeuAKx-bUq_CEVb1yi-_Qngc2i7hDDKahQESjtfbd2Kr-UBsrGIURypSvTf17yE-Lhgv9iJeQE5m3VCINt8_Adt7QeOxBwVs4lEv4IcQEQg%3D)**

I know the success of the conservative agenda depends on leaders, and you can trust that I won’t buckle. I will force other weak-kneed elected officials to buck up, do the right thing, and ignore the absurd shenanigans of the extreme left.

That's the only way you win these games.

Thanks,
Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1PCWSbEoZNUTojlARdROF2Te7rE_I3dDYYVb18RuASjtAej3HKBLk1rUFZDPffjSW4Qujn-h7egG_nolS7y0TZYnixU88PZU7Qr_ChTX4QVaGRfiM4Ules1-xynt9hMLZu4zn85hT586--cytJf8UsxqUAdp3OmK05HgIpr2seQGRLpwPLWdTq2GRjUHIl2leAS3g3SnVzqIaweJ_EG22E5k1ZUz-JYIa0V6piI7UAecbxfswG-OiL2ervPZOTnftg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1N4ZekA8v1ij-0VpHFcXakjtCDo_2_J4fqrW_h2yy_GaQVXpTNhXB1dTfV7bG9nSp0NFXfPn2-8FNhFHNp3RTSEJ9UNsPKLgQDY40nQ17yI7cZDsvTDPLVPWo3YRRWb4xNyd0a3Hki6l0wd87xhb4foQVOtczKZV2sGjf--GTH2ZXv_dKDr1f0ucHBgY7oyaryyY3B8BKJ_vKKwY7HrIiNmt04UtdtxMC8iN3nmk1t4pVVQjVXaMfwjGH6764ThkPQ%3D%3D)
