This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=WaGYzYSaVpZ-FYEvlWp3chmf-OjAJ6TIniHd7y8ROFKriqQOxXlJFIVvSMDfoInQvilOQHl2sVOQs0-salO6aF0RGqMPXLk7sJeqwkYs5DackIxHFoqxyHuSLFio2Q-z64mOFgzg0o195noAKwC3hOIBHsAxCaOSN-gpxlOKYvgX8lwPrmITyd2diOVtsuFOFpUaoeuFePA7vLrC32UUlRepLbZ8_HX_8BuF0bT80VjSUo_rUi8WXQnXfnRCa_bY). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1E9V24vAr0j4JH6gOo2euHM_cd4IFNuMDmbJQT_iRchrQqTyMmTyYeOQmH3lGa1KaOapbCv2M7JtNlZbKzgTfDMayHnI4_GIM3VdXRYkSAmRo9QcxFEeIq5PprkJJIo3rJpc_L8-4bk2xMumBo4gUBAFJG-F2Q0du5XdnzYUa6rTBT3DB81-ViDvUcOt5bWuGLUbh9Dgek33reh_Au8f3q1T3ooQDwhjHCPHjVebYU5tzhSxvnticX4AH5P08BXtMmFU6SyhfMwJkmUR5VC8pVGRW_R4UgPfVUw62mzC5WRlfY3yyn7mqhd6DV8y_mUAfaRCNHaTFmAbFeQZHOjmQ_xi-sjLJF9aSW1ke3k4xtPp) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1E9V24vAr0j4JH6gOo2euHOAqfvU21tHWlcYlTkIlGarwoa5hHZcivQLZA9tjph5137T_Hbuddr_3vXZxTpoO6bVYCgNxVqoiQzNqRKsbyElQQyl1OsBIrp_swQOFrMNUJz-RPvWXlfUYTU7fywJeejY2MLfCeR_DJCDBj0ImGg5TozZIw_j4b2K34gm63y-3DU-pRJzv8JAp6yp4BuzgT0uW6Zpxm7nx1VIcsNELQKHfCEq0GAzC__Apwh5OBtxDtAAraM9JsdRWVZQipqBWiCxc4g22r8HIlxFiYRonWWS-_5-Hr2gM7OEJwcMPubnz-Ry_IUQU1LNUH3JgiP3DOQhDb1ZjqQJVAJZBI-Gwm7B) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1PCWSbEoZNUTojlARdROF2Te7rE_I3dDYYVb18RuASjtkUiKX9_Iuck7L2jTslSTvNapK2sdr4yK_YAYm9ZU5D1AfEzg1MPp0mNSGqAE2ujgBJdxYHo_LT6S0Pmo4qZ2gZT5HBj0zAxrtxfCx_JQB19PA-fG7W27OviYh-RcSM9xjKGty6-M1Nm54Ciy-1uNFOuElgbskUx06Q9e5tRjGDxnKpWyMC8fo9m11i5pqs0bbzdgZ4EdFVWVq7B0Ee9-_w%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1N4ZekA8v1ij-0VpHFcXakjtCDo_2_J4fqrW_h2yy_Ga-t9EOPIOJsT5tdIemj-lUpm0VL1zqhH19l8WQqxtQnfAIY9JYBhnb7I-tsHA7vPB7kB7Y5JoXm7OVEdN7qBhJ30XFMeUegNab0jkw1a_ZQVcS08l7KUug1TCoSmKhS0wlay9nX9eQvZe9_0hhEhhJv7nuPimantA-FoAUR9SgrNqtDPaokFdsOtdOwBJLVB18SPz47n-Nmevu96n-w_Ucg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1IbBNJt0f0fnWFDAVtHAM4mU6aEessLSsnVq0rw0SJBIROjTlxvm1bfdpNLf2DqtnSaKzyVKTMSws1vucWowaCXzFpySWEOR3lH-5NQWxPjsGu0akbhe3Mc2IoyC4haejbhSGAQGacE8Sf0SONAsnXp2g_eAGQugexkZCbL0uqamQs5JOnIixeGZH3A1ih08-nmUBnnzKHCr2Vufg46eI-od4lF4gzlaqrYbjB6z092nLaTM1mY2LKNZ5G6Pk9fBxQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b8db5ab0733d4fadb63af16c5adde2ed&_e=X0ZFkLaf8rcNEtVfaA-M1E9V24vAr0j4JH6gOo2euHOezswi3P4G46Oe56WP1YgSBHxQCy6WlTUX2t3I749BNOPP_Dj1W72Vp_s6wFK2VtwHNohZptILX5Tzohu4SzrAIwerAnJW4vmPm4au6CQd2DIX--fjfLIEaAIFV4SXvZv6HVoCLz6E49SW5vmmmKS716hiUkWHhsyV9CfY_PT-8BCnXsf0mLBnBT2q9Dhz2ATOhuyQHejTIdPq5rkzJiUV1N63fvCLoA5Es4wq1yQGhu9SOLI-E-IyRpnWkCzrqIbPKHdhlzv47y_GTx8pAhbAEV7Q7zsvLF0aPqno3-p219JHWsC8qWrODFmk3CUGakP3kjYxGyIJOkxz57meEP0A7IrwTxM0CiuUK7u_DWRz4A%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. clean_body: Years ago, I joked that I wanted to take Iron Lady Margaret Thatcher’s idea of starting a “rent a spine” business. Right now, it looks like that would Friend, Years ago, I joked that I wanted to take Iron Lady Margaret Thatcher’s idea of starting a “rent a spine” business. Right now, it looks like that would be a successful business in the U.S. Senate! The liberal playbook is in full force. The whole media spectacle, the delay tactics, obstructions, virtue signaling, smears, and hyperbole are now reaching the point of chaos in Washington. And I'm not just talking about Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation saga. These extremist liberal elites turn into professional schemers whenever their party fails at the ballot box. They've done it in Wisconsin to distract from conservative success and force our leaders to back down, and they're doing it now for the same reason. Of course, our own Senator Tammy Baldwin is right there with them – arm in arm as they do everything they can to prevent a successful conservative agenda. And there's only one way to stop the chaos. It's by electing conservatives to elect leaders we can rely on — leaders who will stand up to the liberal playbook. Leaders like me, who won't fall in line with the extreme agenda of Washington elites. Like many in middle America, I’m sick of watching important reforms and nominations get to the Senate floor just to be blocked at the last minute — by those who fall prey to the left’s games. If we had leaders we could rely on, Obamacare would be repealed, and solutions to address high premiums without sacrificing quality of care would be implemented. I know I can change Washington — that's not just talk. I changed Wisconsin already! I took on an incumbent Democrat and won to become the deciding vote in the bold economic reforms that improved our state economy. Now, I see myself in a position where I can’t sit on the sidelines anymore when America needs senators who will enact real change. We need to confirm Judge Kavanaugh and send Senator Baldwin packing. Today, I'm hoping you'll chip in to help me do it: I know the success of the conservative agenda depends on leaders, and you can trust that I won’t buckle. I will force other weak-kneed elected officials to buck up, do the right thing, and ignore the absurd shenanigans of the extreme left. That's the only way you win these games. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Tim Kaine
subject: My friend Heidi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

I gotta tell you, I'm really proud to call Heidi Heitkamp a friend. [Yesterday afternoon, Heidi did what was right as she stood up and proclaimed that she will be voting "no" on Judge Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation to the Supreme Court.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1066/3e0906/769c22a7/3e37a334/3584610302/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-heitkamp-split?refcode=20181005_2_FR_TK_heitkamp-split-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Yesterday+afternoon+Heidi+did+what+was+r&utm_campaign=20181005_2_FR_TK_heitkamp-split-LDND&source=20181005_2_FR_TK_heitkamp-split-LDND")

Like me, Heidi has taken this process very seriously. Giving advice and consent on Supreme Court nominees is one of the most profound and consequential parts of this job, and it's not something any of us can take lightly. In Heidi's statement about her decision, she talked about the message this is sending to girls and women throughout America: **" Our actions right now are a poignant signal to young girls and women across our country. I will continue to stand up for them."** To every person around America and around the world who's watching this process with dismay, Heidi and I say that _we will continue to fight back._ To all those who have felt Dr. Ford's pain, _we stand with you._ To each young girl and woman who wonders who will listen, _we hear you._

**To those who are angry and looking for a way forward --here is what I say today:** These battles are critical, and we are on the cusp of potentially losing this one because there just aren't enough leaders we can rely on to do the right thing. [The only sure way to gain ground in our fight for forward progress is to elect more Democrats, and hold on to the seats we have.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1066/3e0906/769c22a7/3e37a30b/3584610302/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-heitkamp-split?refcode=20181005_2_FR_TK_heitkamp-split-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+The+only+sure+way+to+gain+ground+in+our+&utm_campaign=20181005_2_FR_TK_heitkamp-split-LDND&source=20181005_2_FR_TK_heitkamp-split-LDND")

**Heidi is defending one of our most vulnerable Senate seats in the country, and she 's down in the latest polling. Her constituents rely on her strong, independent leadership--as demonstrated this week--and we simply cannot afford to lose her. Will you make an online donation right now to help defend Heidi's Senate seat from her Republican opponent?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1066/3e0906/769c22a7/3e37a30a/3584610302/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-heitkamp-split?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181005_2_FR_TK_heitkamp-split-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181005_2_FR_TK_heitkamp-split-LDND&source=20181005_2_FR_TK_heitkamp-split-LDND")

They say that Lady Justice is blind. But what Republicans in the Senate are doing right now is turning her blindfold into a gag--to silence people's stories and sweep the truth under the rug. I am proud to stand with Heidi as we work to give justice a voice on behalf of everyone who has ever felt silenced.

Thank you for stepping up today to support her.

_Tim_

A group of generous donors has agreed to DOUBLE MATCH your contribution Remember when Senator McCaskill was touting her bipartisan credentials, saying she respects Missourians who support President Trump? **Well, McCaskill recently said to a closed-door group of supporters that we need to be saved from President Trump.** That’s right, apparently only McCaskill and her liberal allies need to save us from our own democratically elected President.

Sorry, Senator McCaskill, but Missouri doesn’t need saving from Trump, _we need saving from you and Chuck Schumer._

Once again, McCaskill says one thing to Missourians, but will turn around and say the opposite behind closed doors. I know I’ve said this before, but Missouri deserves better, and we need to do better by voting her out in November.

McCaskill has tons of special interest cash, and I need your help to fight back. Thankfully, a group of generous donors has agreed to DOUBLE MATCH your contribution, but only if you donate by midnight tomorrow. name: Andrew
subject: bumping this up
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36b9/9e00690/51238901/2401e745/925614072/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181005_darlin_fnd_gq_act__AD_ettx&source=em18_181005_darlin_fnd_gq_act__AD_ettx")
Hey --

It's Andrew. Not Mayor Andrew Gillum, I'm another Andrew -- but my message is just as important.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36b9/9e00690/51238901/2401e751/925614072/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ad-recure-supporter?gpsid=13_55_4180&refcode=em18_181005_darlin_fnd_gq_act__AD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181005_darlin_fnd_gq_act__AD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=2")
Since being on this campaign, I've gotten to know Mayor Gillum -- and he's one of the most genuine and caring people I've ever met. Just recently, he took the time out of his busy schedule to record a video and wish a happy birthday to one of his biggest fans -- my son. It meant so much to my family.

Just like myself, Mayor Gillum cares about his community and improving our state for the better, not just for regular folks like me -- but for future generations like my son, who I'm hoping to build a better life for.

The thing is, I didn't come from money. I was born in Titusville, grew up in Orlando, and became a teenage parent before graduating from high school. I later served in Iraq twice with the U.S. Army. My wife continues to serve on Active Duty today and recently finished her sixth deployment. In May, I graduated from the University of Miami School of Law.

Like a majority of Floridians, my wife and I started off on different rungs of the economic ladder, but still deserve an equal chance at success. Our non-traditional story has given our kids the skills they need to continue to grow in this ever-changing world.

This election is about understanding where people come from. The struggles that families like mine have faced, Mayor Gillum not only listens to us, he understands us. His leadership abilities and proven track record are why I started supporting him before I joined this campaign -- and he's the best person to lead our state forward in these challenging times.

**[Since May I have been giving $20.18 to the campaign every month. With one month to go, we really need your support. Join me in closing out this election strong by donating $5 weekly to win in 2018.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36b9/9e00690/51238901/2401e76c/925614072/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ad-recure-supporter?gpsid=13_55_4180&refcode=em18_181005_darlin_fnd_gq_act__AD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181005_darlin_fnd_gq_act__AD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=3+-+Since+May+I+have+been+giving+2018+to+the")**

I understand that times are tough, but we need to elect Mayor Gillum.

Let's #BringItHome!

Very Respectfully,

Andrew Darling
Operations Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- "" Hey -- It's Andrew. Not Mayor Andrew Gillum, I'm another Andrew -- but my message is just as important. "" Since being on this campaign, I've gotten to know Mayor Gillum -- and he's one of the most genuine and caring people I've ever met. Just recently, he took the time out of his busy schedule to record a video and wish a happy birthday to one of his biggest fans -- my son. It meant so much to my family. Just like myself, Mayor Gillum cares about his community and improving our state for the better, not just for regular folks like me -- but for future generations like my son, who I'm hoping to build a better life for. The thing is, I didn't come from money. I was born in Titusville, grew up in Orlando, and became a teenage parent before graduating from high school. I later served in Iraq twice with the U.S. Army. My wife continues to serve on Active Duty today and recently finished her sixth deployment. In May, I graduated from the University of Miami School of Law. Like a majority of Floridians, my wife and I started off on different rungs of the economic ladder, but still deserve an equal chance at success. Our non-traditional story has given our kids the skills they need to continue to grow in this ever-changing world. This election is about understanding where people come from. The struggles that families like mine have faced, Mayor Gillum not only listens to us, he understands us. His leadership abilities and proven track record are why I started supporting him before I joined this campaign -- and he's the best person to lead our state forward in these challenging times. "" I understand that times are tough, but we need to elect Mayor Gillum. Let's #BringItHome! Very Respectfully, Andrew Darling Operations Manager Andrew Gillum for Governor "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

name: Sarah Neibart, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: One Month Out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
We’re one month away from Election Day and Team Hugin has been pushing 24/7 to earn every vote across our state. More polls came out this week that re | |
---
|
---
Friend -
We’re one month away from Election Day and Team Hugin has been pushing 24/7 to earn every vote across our state.
Our momentum is strong and growing. This week, more public polls came out confirming what we have known for months -- this race is a dead heat. It seems almost everyday that the Menendez campaign and their friends are using dishonest, underhanded tactics to steal this election away, but we won’t let them.
New Jerseyans aren’t stupid, Senator Menendez. We are a strong, hardworking constituency that expects nothing less from our leaders than someone we can be proud of. Take a look below to see some of our most recent campaign updates.
Sarah Neibart
Deputy Campaign Manager
|
---
|
---
This week, more public polls confirmed the New Jersey U.S. Senate race is one of the most competitive in the country.
While Marine veteran and job creator Bob Hugin continues to gain momentum, corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez continues to flail. As the people of New Jersey continue to learn more about Bob Hugin's track record of service and working with others to get results, we’re confident they will support Bob Hugin on Election Day.
|
---
|
---
Bob fielded questions from nearly 200 attendees for two hours in a town hall yesterday evening hosted by VFW Post 12173 of Toms River. Additional attendees included Congressman Tom MacArthur, veterans, and their families.
Helping our veterans is personal to Bob, not just because he served in the Marines or because his two sons are currently serving, but because he believes everyone who made the sacrifice of service in this nation deserves better.”
|
---
|
---
This week, a progressive millennial Democrat withdrew his endorsement from corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez and endorsed Bob Hugin. Even members of his own party know that Bob Hugin is the best Bob in this race.
|
---
|
---
With just over a month to Election Day, Bob Menendez is running scared and is one of the most vulnerable incumbents in the country.
Bob Hugin is on the verge of making history in New Jersey, but we can't let up. Together, we're going to elect a Senator New Jersey can be proud of.
|
---
|
---
|

name: Dana Bye
subject: another ratings change in our direction!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
The major independent elections forecasters -- Cook Political Report, Sabato's Crystal Ball, CNN, Politico, and now Inside Elections -- all agree: VA-7 is a true toss-up.
| | _It 's official, Peter._ The major independent elections forecasters -- _Cook Political Report, Sabato 's Crystal Ball, CNN, Politico,_ and now _Inside Elections_ \-- all agree: **VA-7 is a true toss-up and one of the most competitive House races across the country.** In case you missed it last week, _Inside Elections_ cited Abigail's strong fundraising and the close polling in our district when announcing that they are the latest forecaster to move our race to toss-up. Please don't forget how significant an accomplishment this is, Peter. This is a historically Republican district, but Abigail is now locked in a tied race with Rep. Dave Brat because of the strength of her message and the strength of this grassroots team. **But we cannot stop at toss-up** \-- we need to keep fighting to take the lead. [**To help us, can you make a donation today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CZcUTsSQHuraomDNnd6iVLLTDXW8rRgU19Tj_LrrLHQ=/nic23UvvIX5r5gJ4GL5IjBertezjHJCECnLi2368lWg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.05_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This election year really is flying by -- as of today, we are 32 days out from Election Day -- [**so any support you can lend us in the final stretch is sincerely appreciated, Peter.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CZcUTsSQHuraomDNnd6iVLLTDXW8rRgU19Tj_LrrLHQ=/nic23UvvIX5r5gJ4GL5IjBertezjHJCECnLi2368lWg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.05_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CZcUTsSQHuraomDNnd6iVLLTDXW8rRgU19Tj_LrrLHQ=/nic23UvvIX5r5gJ4GL5IjBertezjHJCECnLi2368lWg=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.05_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CZcUTsSQHuraomDNnd6iVLLTDXW8rRgU19Tj_LrrLHQ=/nic23UvvIX5r5gJ4GL5IjBertezjHJCECnLi2368lWg=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/CZcUTsSQHuraomDNnd6iVLLTDXW8rRgU19Tj_LrrLHQ=/Sb2OlaxG4k-WJzz4uTynZCQ7OGuoj_LkzoOxopYo93M=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: Greg Stanton
subject: I'm fired up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Today marks one year since we launched our campaign for Congress.

Look, especially after these last few weeks, I'm fired up. Arizonans and the values we stand for are getting shortchanged in Washington but with new leadership, we can change that.

[**Take a look at our _first_ campaign video and remember why this campaign is so critical >>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bA-v8Wrte_xZDbJjy2YAQhJUcOeBk5tCjbIXJKlcadM=/qQlSs0pzTK-nku3u3oeJT8I3kXQOVKoDeoa9d-lyvRQ=?refcode=X_100518_Anniversary_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bA-v8Wrte_xZDbJjy2YAQhJUcOeBk5tCjbIXJKlcadM=/MNHub3fz87SIV8s4b9CoDJ1kNXfbgeTnDFJsHJbAgaI=?refcode=X_100518_Anniversary_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)

It is incredible to think about all of the hard work and sacrifices we have made over this past year. And the best part? All the momentum we've built is so close to paying off.

With just over a month left in this race, we need to give this race everything we've got.

[**Will**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bA-v8Wrte_xZDbJjy2YAQhJUcOeBk5tCjbIXJKlcadM=/qQlSs0pzTK-nku3u3oeJT8I3kXQOVKoDeoa9d-lyvRQ=?refcode=X_100518_Anniversary_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)[**you chip in today and help send me to Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bA-v8Wrte_xZDbJjy2YAQhJUcOeBk5tCjbIXJKlcadM=/qQlSs0pzTK-nku3u3oeJT8I3kXQOVKoDeoa9d-lyvRQ=?refcode=X_100518_Anniversary_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)

Thank you,

\-- _Greg _

[__](https://act.myngp.com/el/bA-v8Wrte_xZDbJjy2YAQhJUcOeBk5tCjbIXJKlcadM=/qQlSs0pzTK-nku3u3oeJT8I3kXQOVKoDeoa9d-lyvRQ=?refcode=X_100518_Anniversary_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)

name: Lindsay Coleman
subject: a new poll -- and a new goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
You might think that we'd be worried about the new poll showing Tom trailing. But here at Team O'Halleran, we don't get worried -- we get ORGANIZED.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ead/1a8421e1/19a69e46a/493ab17c/259698681/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, Yesterday, we told you about the new poll of our race showing Wendy Rogers with a narrow lead over Tom. You might think that we'd be worried about this news.**But here at Team O 'Halleran, we don't get worried -- we get _ORGANIZED_.** So we're responding to this new poll with a new goal and a new plan of action to take back the lead. [**Team, can you make a donation today to help us beat back this threat and keep AZ-01 blue? I 've set a goal of reaching 100 grassroots contributions today, so we have the resources we need to share the truth about Tom's record to voters across our district.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.05_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. ---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.05_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.05_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I'm confident that this grassroots team has what it takes to overcome this challenge and re-elect Tom next month. We always knew this race would be tight -- **this is a perennial battleground district,_and Tom is the most vulnerable Democrat in the House_ \-- **so we're prepared to close this race strong.

We'll do so by running more ads on TV, registering more voters, and knocking thousands more doors. That's how we'll make sure voters are aware of Tom's record of standing up for Arizonans -- and Wendy Rogers's record of extremism _(remember, she thinks Social Security is unconstitutional)._

But that will all take resources, which is why I really need 100 of you to support our efforts with a donation today. [_**Chip in if you can.**_](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.05_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Lindsay Coleman
Finance Director

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. subject: Heidi Heitkamp's Supreme Court vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hey there -- Senator Heidi Heitkamp showed tremendous political courage yesterday when she vowed to vote "no" on Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation to the Supreme Court.
**With polls already showing her behind, this decision could come at a very high political price tag for her reelection campaign._With so much on the line, we cannot afford for her to lose._**

clean_body: | | | Elections have consequences. Elections dictate our country 's values and priorities. We're witnessing it right now in Washington. With 32 days to go, we are in the final stretch of the midterm election. Sherrod's opponent wants to prove that Ohio is a "Trump State." The results of Sherrod's election may come down to the difference of a few votes. Recent polling shows that Sherrod only has a single-digit lead over his Trump-backed opponent. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" If we want to keep Sherrod in the Senate, we need your support to push back against President Trump and his allies. "" Together, we'll prove Ohio isn't a "Trump State." Team Sherrod | "" "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We must start voting on climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's time to take action.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b874/2f5ea88d/74cbd624/2cbc6ce6/146159300/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/6227578465/posts/10156755796128466/") Friend, **Did you see my op-ed this week in CNN?** [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b874/2f5ea88d/74cbd624/2cbc6ce6/146159300/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/6227578465/posts/10156755796128466/") Donald Trump sure has been blowing a lot of smoke on climate change recently. But we here in the West have been choking on it all summer. The terrible impact of climate change on our health, our economy, our property, and our lives is proven fact. So it's time to start electing people, from mayors to governors, who are willing to confront climate change -- before it's too late. I made just that case recently in a CNN op-ed. [**Read my op-ed, and then commit to talking to at least 10 of your friends about voting. It's time for all of us to take action.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b874/2f5ea88d/74cbd624/2cbc6ce6/146159300/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/6227578465/posts/10156755796128466/") Friend, we must start voting on climate change. And we can in just a few weeks, in voter initiatives and in elections for governors and state legislatures throughout the country. Combating climate change is the defining challenge of our time. It demands our attention, it demands our passion, and it demands our voting. This November, I hope you will get out and vote for an American clean energy future. Our children and grandchildren are counting on us to act -- now. [**Check out what I had to say.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b874/2f5ea88d/74cbd624/2cbc6ce6/146159300/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/6227578465/posts/10156755796128466/") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [READ & SHARE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b874/2f5ea88d/74cbd624/2cbc6ce6/146159300/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/6227578465/posts/10156755796128466/")

subject: Braun = Right Track, Donnelly = Wrong Track
body:
What a week! Following a Democrat-manufactured media circus, today the U.S. Senate finally voted to end debate on the confirmation of Judge Brett... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/braun-right-track-donnelly-wrong-track?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9c51016174&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bc0fafe96c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Braun = Right Track, Donnelly = Wrong Track_** What a week! Following a Democrat-manufactured media circus, today the U.S. Senate finally voted to end debate on the confirmation of Judge Brett Kavanaugh, which will lead to a vote tomorrow on whether President Trump’s well-qualified nominee will join the U.S. Supreme Court. And – as expected – we got more of the same from Democrat Joe Donnelly, as he stood with Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren and his other fellow Democrats to cast his first NO vote on the Senate floor against Judge Kavanaugh. Expect to see the final vote -- and another NO -- tomorrow.

But really, this vote is nothing new. That's because Democrat Donnelly has been an in-the-can vote for his Democrat Party bosses whenever they need him most. **Mike Braun** details it well in his latest ad. Democrat Donnelly...
* Backed Nancy Pelosi to be Speaker of the House
* Endorsed Hillary Clinton for president
* Voted for Obama’s disastrous Iran Nuclear Deal
* Voted against President Trump’s tax cuts
* And is now opposing putting another constitutional conservative on the bench

Looking ahead, it’s going to be another crazy week next week – with dueling vice presidents in the state.

On Friday, Vice President Mike Pence is coming back home again to deliver keynote remarks at the 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner. This morning, we were excited to announce that RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel will be joining him as a special guest!

That’s while Democrats are bringing in Joe Biden for an event at the same time in Northern Indiana. They're putting up a fight, but we're not backing down.

Keep an eye on your inbox, as this midterm election continues to heat up here in Indiana!

-Kyle Hupfer

_**Photo: **Check out [Mike Braun’s latest ad](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=12501eb8c8&e=1acd9bb3d6) – Reality – which shows us what Democrat Joe Donnelly is really up to when he’s in DC._
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| **_Jobs, Jobs & More Jobs!_**
Under the leadership of **Governor Eric Holcomb** , Indiana is on the right track! And this week, when it comes to the economy, Governor Holcomb was delivering results for Hoosiers with not one - _but TWO_ \- major jobs announcements.

First, **Governor Holcomb** joined Sweetwater Sound, a homegrown company that has risen to now be the largest online retailer of musical instruments and audio gear. The company announced that it is adding more than 1,000 new quality paying jobs in Fort Wayne, along with investing $76.4 million into its operations in Northeast Indiana! [Check out the video here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=baddd56901&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

And then yesterday he was with Dormakaba, a Switzerland-based company that is expanding its operations in Indianapolis. The company is establishing its Access Solutions Americas segment headquarters in the Circle City and creating more than 100 great new jobs for Hoosiers!

But it doesn't stop there. Today is Manufacturing Day, and to celebrate, manufacturers across Indiana are coming together to announce more than 1,000 new Hoosier jobs coming to the state!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_Solutions Tour Continues!_**
**Mike Braun** has been hard at work this week!

He was on the road, traveling across Indiana as part of his Solutions Tour! This includes a stop by the Koscuisko County Fish Fry in Warsaw, and participating in Boone County's Prescription Drug Take-Back Day in Zionsville.

Plus, this race continues to heat up on the airwaves. You've probably seen **Mike Braun's** latest ad, [Results](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ee52e94493&e=1acd9bb3d6). **Mike Braun** continues to keep Democrat Joe Donnelly accountable for his antics in Washington. Here's what the Braun team had to say about Democrat Donnelly's first vote today against Judge Brett Kavanaugh:

_“Senator Donnelly has spent months saying he shares our Hoosier values and will work with President Trump, but he just voted against ending debate so that we could have a final confirmation vote for President Trump’s highly qualified nominee to the Supreme Court. Donnelly says one thing when he's in Indiana and does another in Washington, and this is just the latest example. Mike Braun proudly supports Brett Kavanaugh and he's exactly who President Trump needs in Washington.”_

Keep an eye out for **Mike Braun** \-- on TV, in the news, and in your community!
---
|
---
| | **_2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b84d92f562&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_RNC Chairwoman Special Guest at Fall Dinner!_** Just announced! **Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel** will join **Vice President Mike Pence** as a special guest at the 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner!

The dinner, which is just one week from today, is nearly sold out! We're well on our way to making this the largest state dinner ever. If you plan on attending, make sure you [secure your tickets NOW!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3aff7e7d1d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [Get Your Tickets Now!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=495a0b9dfa&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Get Your Tickets Now!")
---
|
---
| | **_Indiana Fact of the Week_**
---
|
---
| **_Indiana's Business Climate is TOPS!_**
If there was any question if Indiana was on the right track, check this out: For the fourth consecutive year, Indiana is maintaining its spot as a top 10 state for its business tax climate!

According to the Tax Foundation, Indiana stands out nationally as a top destination for starting and growing a business, with capped property taxes and continuously dropping corporate taxes that will fall to 4.9% by 2021.

[Click here to check out all the facts about Indiana's top 10 business tax climate!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c1b1fa154d&e=1acd9bb3d6)

The company is establishing its Access Solutions Americas segment headquarters in the Circle City and creating more than 100 great new jobs for Hoosiers! But it doesn't stop there. Today is Manufacturing Day, and to celebrate, manufacturers across Indiana are coming together to announce more than 1,000 new Hoosier jobs coming to the state! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Solutions Tour Continues! Mike Braun has been hard at work this week! He was on the road, traveling across Indiana as part of his Solutions Tour! This includes a stop by the Koscuisko County Fish Fry in Warsaw, and participating in Boone County's Prescription Drug Take-Back Day in Zionsville. Plus, this race continues to heat up on the airwaves. You've probably seen Mike Braun's latest ad, . Mike Braun continues to keep Democrat Joe Donnelly accountable for his antics in Washington. Here's what the Braun team had to say about Democrat Donnelly's first vote today against Judge Brett Kavanaugh: “Senator Donnelly has spent months saying he shares our Hoosier values and will work with President Trump, but he just voted against ending debate so that we could have a final confirmation vote for President Trump’s highly qualified nominee to the Supreme Court. Donnelly says one thing when he's in Indiana and does another in Washington, and this is just the latest example. Mike Braun proudly supports Brett Kavanaugh and he's exactly who President Trump needs in Washington.” Keep an eye out for Mike Braun \-- on TV, in the news, and in your community! | | | 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner | | RNC Chairwoman Special Guest at Fall Dinner! Just announced! Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel will join Vice President Mike Pence as a special guest at the 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner! The dinner, which is just one week from today, is nearly sold out! We're well on our way to making this the largest state dinner ever. If you plan on attending, make sure you | "Get Your Tickets Now!" | | | Indiana Fact of the Week | | Indiana's Business Climate is TOPS! If there was any question if Indiana was on the right track, check this out: For the fourth consecutive year, Indiana is maintaining its spot as a top 10 state for its business tax climate! According to the Tax Foundation, Indiana stands out nationally as a top destination for starting and growing a business, with capped property taxes and continuously dropping corporate taxes that will fall to 4.9% by 2021. | | Upcoming Republican Events : Clay County BBQ & Pie Auction : Crawford County Republican Underground Lincoln Day Dinner : 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner : Laconia Festival Booth & Parade : Wabash County Republican Fall Dinner : Bartholomew County Fall Dinner & Silent Auction : Harrison County GOP Fall Dinner : Annual Kosciusko County Republican Hall of Fame Dinner : Union County Lincoln Day Dinner : Jackson County Republican Party Fall Dinner : Halloween Parade in Corydon : Allen County Bean Dinner : Henry County Republican Club Speech Contest for High School Students | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb **joins Lt. name: Mike Braun
subject: Hoosiers Stand With Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhdiiyd-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter One of the reasons we elected President Trump in 2016 was because we knew he would appoint highly qualified Justices to the Supreme Court. **And that’s exactly what he did when he nominated Judge Kavanaugh.** But Sleepin’ Joe and his radical liberal cronies in Washington have worked hard to obstruct the President’s America-first agenda and turn the nomination process into a media circus. [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhdiiyd-kujulhlke-j/) **Hoosiers aren’t buying it, and we’re sick of Sleepin’ Joe and the fake news media playing fast and loose with facts for political gain.** [Hoosiers stand with Judge Brett Kavanaugh and his family, and so do I.](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhdiiyd-kujulhlke-t/) Join me in telling Sleepin’ Joe and the DC Swamp that we’re tired of their games and we want them to do their jobs – **confirm Judge Kavanaugh**. Mike [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhdiiyd-kujulhlke-i/) |
